---
name: Bug report
about: Report incorrect, unsafe, or confusing behavior in the standard
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe what is wrong or confusing.

## Affected Files

List the files, templates, or examples involved.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what the standard should say or validate instead.

## Evidence

Include links, excerpts, or reproduction steps when possible.
